caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back in a bun is seated in front of a plain white background. She is wearing a dark navy blue blazer over a red top. To her left, a clear plastic water bottle sits on a surface. The logo "mediasite by koretechnologies" is visible at the top of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains seated and maintains a similar posture with her hands resting in her lap. She is looking toward her right, away from the camera. Between the frames, her expression shifts slightly as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing and her head tilting minimally while she continues to gaze off-screen. There are no other people or objects visible in the scene.
